'''zhazovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadiness|leadiness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadiness|leadiness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhazovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzeveth|zhæzeveth]] || [[word:zhæzevej|zhæzevej]] || [[word:zhæzevesh|zhæzevesh]] || [[word:zhæzeve|zhæzeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazozovoth|zhazozovoth]] || [[word:zhazozovoj|zhazozovoj]] || [[word:zhazozovosh|zhazozovosh]] || [[word:zhazozovo|zhazozovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazovoth|zhazovoth]] || [[word:zhazovoj|zhazovoj]] || [[word:zhazovosh|zhazovosh]] || [[word:zhazovo|zhazovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazofvoth|zhazofvoth]] || [[word:zhazofvoj|zhazofvoj]] || [[word:zhazofvosh|zhazofvosh]] || [[word:zhazofvof|zhazofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazovotho|zhazovotho]] || [[word:zhazovojo|zhazovojo]] || [[word:zhazovosho|zhazovosho]] || [[word:zhazovoko|zhazovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazovoth|zhazovoth]] || [[word:zhazovoj|zhazovoj]] || [[word:zhazovosh|zhazovosh]] || [[word:zhazovo|zhazovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazovothol|zhazovothol]] || [[word:zhazovojol|zhazovojol]] || [[word:zhazovoshol|zhazovoshol]] || [[word:zhazovokol|zhazovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazovothotho|zhazovothotho]] || [[word:zhazovojojo|zhazovojojo]] || [[word:zhazovoshosho|zhazovoshosho]] || [[word:zhazovoko|zhazovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazovothon|zhazovothon]] || [[word:zhazovojon|zhazovojon]] || [[word:zhazovoshon|zhazovoshon]] || [[word:zhazovokon|zhazovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazovothoro|zhazovothoro]] || [[word:zhazovojoro|zhazovojoro]] || [[word:zhazovoshoro|zhazovoshoro]] || [[word:zhazovokoro|zhazovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
